step_by_step_thinking:
Leeway space is primarily due to the difference in the size and shape between deciduous teeth and their corresponding permanent successors. Specifically, the deciduous canines and molars are significantly different from their permanent counterparts, providing ample room for the new permanent structures without causing immediate overcrowding issues.
